options.a: starts at the end of the runway and is symmetrical about the runway centre line. Its minimum length is 90 m.
options.b: starts at the end of the runway and is symmetrical about the runway centre line. Its minimum length is 150 m.
options.c: starts at the end of the runway strip and is symmetrical about the runway centre line. Its minimum length is 300 m.
options.d: starts at the end of the runway strip and is symmetrical about the runway centre line. Its minimum length is 90 m.
